b2b.headline: Lunch employees order themselves.
b2b.subheadline: Up to 450 PLN/employee per month, tax-exempt. Zero admin on your side.
b2b.heroTagline: - a real benefit for your employees.
b2b.step1Desc: If you're an employer looking for a great benefit for your team — call us or fill in the form. We'll call back within 24h.
b2b.step2Desc: Set a monthly meal subsidy limit per employee. Up to 450 PLN per person is exempt from social contributions.
b2b.step3Desc: Your employees get access to the GN Lunch app and order meals as part of their employee benefit.
b2b.step4Desc: Each employee independently selects their favourite meals 3 days before delivery, with full visibility over their limit.
b2b.step5Desc: We deliver daily to your designated office spot. When the budget runs out, employees top up themselves — by card, BLIK, or transfer.
b2b.formSub: Fill in the form — we'll call you back within 24 business hours.
b2b.successDesc: We'll call you back within 24 business hours. Talk soon!

menu.orderDeadline: Orders must be placed at least 1 day in advance

gallery.subtitle: Zero photoshop. Zero stock photos. Real food, real camera.

hero.subheadline: Fresh, healthy meals. Restaurant quality delivered straight to Your door.

howItWorks.title: From order to table
howItWorks.subtitle: Steps 2–5 take us exactly 24 hours.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Browse the weekly menu and pick what you fancy today. Pork schnitzel? Sushi? Both — your call.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Suppliers deliver INAO-certified ingredients straight from farms, not freezers. The 24-hour countdown begins.
howItWorks.step3Desc: The kitchen fires up. Fresh veg, real meat, proper recipes. No pre-made bases, no frozen shortcuts.
howItWorks.step4Desc: No preservatives, no artificial additives. Packed so your meal arrives just as good as it left the kitchen.
howItWorks.step5Desc: We're at your door between 8:00 and 10:00 — exactly 24 hours after we started cooking. Freshness has standards.

differentiators.subtitle: And neither should you.
differentiators.inaoDesc: We use only ingredients certified by the French National Institute of Origin and Quality. Because good food starts with good produce.
differentiators.freshDesc: Your meal reaches you within 24 hours of being made. Zero artificial preservatives. Zero frozen food.
differentiators.noFakeDesc: We don't count calories for you. We just make great food — for meat lovers, vegetarians, and spice enthusiasts.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: How far in advance do I need to order?
faq.a1: Orders must be placed at least 1 day in advance. Order today — get it tomorrow morning between 8:00 and 10:00.
faq.a2: We deliver between 8:00 and 10:00, so you have food before the real workday begins.
faq.a3: Each dish includes information about its main ingredients. For serious allergies, please contact us — you'll find our number and email at the bottom of the page.
faq.q4: Can I order for the whole office?
faq.a4: Absolutely! Write or call us — we're happy to discuss group orders and special terms for your office.
faq.q5: How often does the menu change?
faq.a5: The menu changes every week. There's always something new to discover — from traditional Polish dishes to sushi and world cuisines.

loyalty.title: Loyalty programme
loyalty.desc: Earn points for every order and invite your office colleagues. Our regulars will hear first.
loyalty.thanks: Done! We'll let you know first.

socialProof.heading: Not just the Bear recommends it
socialProof.review0: Delicious every day, great variety — I mainly order main courses, which I rate 5+. Portions are perfect, food is fresh and tasty. The price is fair and the quality is truly impressive. You cook brilliantly, thank you!
socialProof.review1: The Bear may be hungry, but only because we eat everything it cooks and delivers through Mr. Mateusz, who makes sure we're never hungry at work 🙂 The food is delicious — I especially recommend the main courses. Great choice, you can order an XXL lunch when hunger strikes harder. There are also veggie options, soups, tortillas, sandwiches, desserts, salads, and apparently sushi too. Great that you can see the full week's menu on the website. Prices are very reasonable. I'm also thrilled to see cepelinai with meat in the offer — they're delicious and hard to find elsewhere.
socialProof.review2: When I saw that Głodny Niedźwiedź had reached Tarnów, I was shocked — I associated it with the Tricity area. But the food is just as good: tasty, interesting flavour combinations, colourful, fresh. And great variety, including veggie options. Whatever I choose turns out to be delicious. Plus points for saving food through Too Good To Go!
socialProof.review3: Every day at work I patiently wait for the little bear to rescue me from hunger 🙂 From sandwiches, soups, mains, salads, juices to insanely delicious desserts like from a fine restaurant. Every dish looks beautiful and tastes even better. In Tarnowskie Góry our orders are handled wonderfully and greeted with a lovely smile every day. Little bear, how wonderful that you don't hibernate and instead spoil our tummies and taste buds. Thank you!
socialProof.review4: Catering from Głodny Niedźwiedź is a real feast every day — desserts to die for, and the menu is bigger than the TV series selection. Our courier Magda is very professional and dedicated — she's saved me from hunger more than once when I forgot to order, always coming through with something delicious. Highly recommended!
socialProof.review5: I rarely write reviews online, but this time I have to — the food is absolutely delicious!! Chicken salad with roasted beetroot, pearl barley and feta — a total bomb. Gingerbread oatmeal with plum jam — the best oatmeal I've ever had. 20/10. I used to have meal boxes, but the food was bland and tasteless, so I quit quickly. This food has me completely won over. Highly recommended!
socialProof.review6: Głodny Niedźwiedź catering offers a diverse menu that satisfies a wide range of tastes and dietary preferences. Dishes are carefully composed and prices are very competitive. Highlights: variety — the menu covers vegetarian and meat options; fresh ingredients — salads and soups show quality produce; interesting flavour combinations — dishes like Pad Thai and ramen show they're not afraid to experiment with world cuisines.
socialProof.review7: Very good food, very affordable prices, everything fresh and carefully prepared. Ms. Julia is an absolute gem of an employee. Highly recommended!!!
